title: Wandergram Dreams: The Creator’s Journey
fullPrompt: Generate an image using this prompt and give image - use the uploaded images as references and create an ultra-cute 3d instagram diorama. image a is the user’s photo reference — transform the person into a pixar-style semi-realistic 3d male figurine with 100% same facial identity, preserving the face, hairstyle, expression, and overall recognizable look, while styling the character with stylish short hair, a casual trendy outfit, sneakers, soft facial features, and a gentle confident smile standing naturally in front. image b is the instagram profile reference — recreate it as a soft rounded instagram profile panel in beige, cream, light grey, sage green, and muted blue tones, clearly showing the profile picture, username, bio, followers, story highlights, and grid thumbnails in a cute stylized 3d format. surround the scene with travel props such as suitcase stickers, an airplane, passport, tickets, polaroids, a signpost, a hot air balloon, and a world map base. add cozy desk items like books, a planner, a mug, pens, a camera, and sunglasses. decorate the overall scene with soft stars, clouds, subtle geometric accents, pearls, and clay textures. use warm golden-hour lighting, dreamy shadows, depth of field, and a slightly low-angle centered composition. the final result should look like an ultra-detailed blender-style 4k 3d diorama, clean, aesthetic, polished, and visually rich.
author: Admin

title: Chosen Circle: Legends Around the King
fullPrompt:

Place me in the exact center as a realistic human (keep my real face and proportions). Surround me with these characters in semi-realistic cinematic anime style (NOT cartoonish, more detailed and realistic textures):
Naruto Uzumaki, Sasuke Uchiha, Itachi Uchiha, Kakashi Hatake, Ichigo Kurosaki, Monkey D. Luffy, Roronoa Zoro, Satoru Gojo, Izuku Midoriya, Katsuki Bakugo, Killua Zoldyck, Ryomen Sukuna.

Add glowing orange embers, blue lightning effects, dramatic shadows, volumetric lighting, ultra detailed textures, high contrast, cinematic grading, realistic skin lighting on the center subject, sharp focus, epic atmosphere. Do not rearrange the formation. Do not change the camera angle. Match the original framing exactly.
